---
title: "lightning_rod.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/lightning_rod.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 4.31
overall_score: 4.13
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignHUD, box_top.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignHUD and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `LightningOrchestrator`
- `execute`
